emails.subject: Mid-Year 2001 Feedback Deadline
emails.body: Mid-Year 2001 Feedback Deadline CYNTHIA MANN, The PEP system closes on Friday, May 25, 2001. Our records indicate that you have not selected reviewers. Please suggest a list of reviewers as quickly as possible the feedback process cannot begin until your list of reviewers has been reviewed and approved by your supervisor. To suggest your reviewers, access PEP at <URL> and select 'Suggest Reviewers' from the Main Menu. If you have any questions regarding the PRC process or the PEP system, please contact the PEP Help Desk at: Houston: 1.713.853.4777, Option 4 or email: perfmgmt@enron.com London: 44.207.783.4040, Option 4 or email: pep.enquiries@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Mid-Year 2001 Feedback Deadline
emails.body: Re: Mid-Year 2001 Feedback Deadline Hi there. I have not received my password yet. Do I use the one from the end of 2000? Thanks, Kay "Performance Evaluation Process (PEP)" <perfmgmt@enron.com> on 05/17/2001 07:40:12 PM
